reviews.comment:
Una estación de servicio con Parador completa con baños limpios y buena la atención.
Hay variedad de productos para comprar en el Parador desde café hasta golosinas o bebidas.
Aceptan( en el sector carga de combustible) tarjetas de crédito.

(Translated by Google)
A service station with a rest stop, complete with clean restrooms and good service.
There's a variety of products to buy at the rest stop, from coffee to sweets and drinks.
Credit cards are accepted (at the fuel pumps).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwaU9iT25RRRAB
